name: Venison Teriyaki
recipeInstructions:
1. Prepare the venison to serve in one of the following ways: bite size pieces, steak, or finger steaks.
2. Blend all marinade ingredients thoroughly and marinate the meat for 2-4 hours.
3. Grill or broil the meat to your desired degree of doneness. Baste occasionally with marinade.
4. Watch carefully when cooking the bite-sized pieces, as they cook quickly.
